queries.question: Display podcasts and audio documents lasting 60 minutes.
queries.sql:
SELECT Podcasts.title
FROM Podcasts
WHERE Podcasts.Length = 60
UNION
SELECT AudioDocuments.title
FROM AudioDocuments
WHERE AudioDocuments.Length = 60
